tame_hippogryph.title: Tame a Hippogryph and equip it with a saddle

fly_distance.title: Fly 1000+ blocks on the tamed Hippogryph during an Eye Hunt scouting run

subtitle.text: The hunt is faster with altitude.

description: A tamed Hippogryph with saddle is one of the fastest
overworld travel options available before elytra.
The Eye Hunt requires covering jungle temples, desert dungeons,
ocean monuments, frozen oceans, and eventually the Nether.
Ground travel for this is slow.
The Hippogryph is the answer to that problem.
Aerial view also helps locate structures.
Jungle temples are easier to spot from above.
Desert ruins, Alex's Mobs structures, Dungeon Now Loading dungeons.
Use it. The Eye Hunt is about to require it.
→ Tame a Hippogryph and saddle it [check]
→ Fly 1000+ blocks on a scouting run [check]
